name: ACE Cash Express
description_short: ACE Cash Express offers small emergency loans, title loans, check cashing, and financial services with multiple locations nationwide and online lending options.
description_long:
ACE Cash Express is an established financial services company that operates both physical store locations and online lending platforms across the United States. The company has maintained a presence in multiple states, though some locations have been temporarily affected by natural disasters, as evidenced by their Hurricane Ida closure notices. ACE provides a range of short-term financial solutions designed for consumers needing immediate cash access.

The company's core offerings include installment loans, title loans, check cashing services, bill payments, money transfers, tax services, and business services. They advertise same-day or next-day funding for online loans and maintain both phone and email customer service channels. ACE operates a store locator tool on their website to help customers find nearby physical locations, and they offer online lending options for eligible consumers.

ACE Cash Express distinguishes itself through its multi-service approach, combining traditional check-cashing and bill-payment services with modern online lending. They operate in multiple states and maintain a significant retail footprint, suggesting established regulatory compliance infrastructure. The company also emphasizes customer service availability through multiple contact channels and maintains state-specific compliance notices, such as their California Notice at Collection.

The primary limitation evident from the website is that loan availability varies significantly by state—the website explicitly states 'this type of loan is not available in this state' for certain product offerings in certain jurisdictions. Consumers should verify product availability in their state before applying. The website content provided is primarily navigation and customer service information; detailed terms, rates, and specific product features are not fully accessible through the provided pages.
pros: Multiple service types available in one location (loans, check cashing, bill payments, money transfers, tax services)
Online lending option available for customers who prefer digital application
Same-day or next-day funding advertised for online loans
Physical store locations across multiple states for in-person service
Multiple customer service contact options (phone and email support)
State-specific compliance information provided (California Notice at Collection)
cons: Loan product availability is highly restricted by state—many products unavailable in certain states
Website navigation issues and broken location pages suggest outdated or poorly maintained digital infrastructure
No specific APR, fee, or term information publicly visible on the provided website pages
Temporary store closures due to natural disasters can affect access to physical locations
best_for: Consumers needing immediate cash in states where ACE services are available
Customers with vehicle title who may qualify for title loans
People seeking check cashing or bill payment services at a physical location
diagnosis: ACE Cash Express is best suited for consumers in eligible states who need small emergency loans or check-cashing services and prefer either in-person or online options. The critical caveat is that product availability varies dramatically by state, and prospective customers must verify whether their specific loan type is offered in their location before applying.

cfpb_data.cfpb_company_name: Populus Financial Group, Inc. (F/K/A Ace Cash Express)
